info: Settings used for NPJ phase diagram module

settings.description: Performs calculations of North Pacific jet regime statistics
settings.name: NPJphase

climatological zonal wind.long_name: Climatological Zonal Wind from ERA5 during September-May 1979-2014
climatological zonal wind.description: Contains zonal wind anomalies over the North Pacific during September-May 1979-2014 from ERA5, which are used to compute zonal wind anomalies within the module. Anomalies are available in 21-day running means centered on each day during the cold season or monthly and on three vertical levels (200, 250, 300 hPa)

ERA5 EOF patterns.long_name: Two leading EOF patterns of zonal wind anomalies during September-May 1979-2014 over the North Pacific within ERA5
ERA5 EOF patterns.description: These files contain the two leading EOFs of zonal wind anomalies during September–May 1979-2014 over the North Pacific within ERA5. EOF patterns are defined on three vertical levels (200, 250, 300 hPa), and using daily or monthly data
